risk_rationale: The Child Marriage Prevention Act of 2024 establishes federal standards for marriage age, which does not directly impact TikTok's existing minor protection standards related to account registration and privacy settings.
business_impact: Minimal business impact as the legislation does not directly affect TikTok's operations or compliance requirements related to minor protection standards.
recommended_actions: Monitor the implementation of the Child Marriage Prevention Act for any indirect implications on digital platforms.
Engage with legal counsel to ensure no indirect compliance requirements arise from the legislation.
Continue to review and update minor protection standards in line with evolving federal and state regulations.
